name: Hopmon
description: A Baby Dragon Digimon that evolved from Ketomon . Its entire body is covered in scales small enough to be invisible to the naked eye, and its body is sturdier than it looks. It has overcome its timid personality, and has a budding sense of justice that despises the crooked even at its young age. Its Signature Move is bouncing like a Super Ball and striking with its rear ( Hop Hip ).
